## 4 · Per-CLI Driving Recipe Matrix

This is the per-agent behavioral spec the `interactive-tmux` provider encodes and hides from callers.

| Dimension | claude | codex | gemini |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Submit keys** | `send-keys -l TEXT` then `send-keys Enter` (two-step) | `TEXT` + `C-j` + `C-m` (first msg); `Enter` sufficient after | `TEXT` + `Enter` — never `C-m` (unreliable via docker exec) |
| **Readiness signals** | 3-AND: no "esc to interrupt"; `❯\s*$` empty; "? for shortcuts" footer | `• Working` absent AND pane content byte-stable across N polls | `Type your message or @path/to/file` prompt indicator |
| **Init gates** | Pre-seed `~/.claude.json` (onboarding skip + workspace trust + installMethod:npm-global); tmux size `-x 200 -y 50` | Launch `--no-alt-screen`; send `1`+Enter (trust); send `Escape` (hooks) | `settings.json` patch: `security.folderTrust.enabled: false`; node≥22 image |
| **Auth mount** | `~/.claude/` (dir; tokens in `.credentials.json`) **+** `~/.claude.json` (file; metadata) | `~/.claude/ dir only (skip tmp/log/logs on copy) | `~/.gemini/` dir (OAuth) |
| **First-prompt quirk** | None after init | C-j C-m required — single C-m does not dispatch | None after settings patch |
| **Image base** | node:22-slim (matches production) | node:22 | node:22 (node:18 crashes) |

**Key contradiction resolved (EXP-05a):** EXP-01 and EXP-04 disagreed on where Claude OAuth tokens live.  
Empirical 2×2 matrix:

| Mount | Auth outcome |
|---|---|
| `~/.claude/` only | Max plan ✅; onboarding wizard fires |
| `~/.claude.json` only | API billing (Sonnet 4.6), no Max plan; wizard skipped |
| both | Max plan ✅; wizard skipped ✅ — required for unattended operation |
| none | Needs login |

EXP-01 was correct on token location (`.credentials.json`). EXP-04 was correct to mount both; incorrect on which file holds tokens.

---

## 5 · Friction Items by Category and Agent

Across all three FRICTION files (20 items total):

| Category | Claude | Codex | Gemini | Total |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `config` | 3 | 1 | 3 | **7** |
| `workaround-found` | 4 | 1 | 0 | **5** |
| `tooling-bug` | 1 | 2 | 1 | **4** |
| `docs-gap` | 1 | 1 | 2 | **4** |
| **Total** | **9** | **5** | **6** | **20** |

Note: Gemini's friction file covers both EXP-03 (CLI) and EXP-04 (swarm) friction — items G-4/G-5/G-6 are cross-agent gotchas discovered during swarm testing.

**All 20 items have documented workarounds.** None blocked a `go` verdict.

**Most friction-heavy agent:** claude (9 items) — reflecting the depth of EXP-01's investigation protocol (3 runs × 5 legs + gotcha extraction). Gemini (6) and codex (5) ran shallower single-run protocols.

**Category breakdown across all agents:**
- `config` dominates (7/20 = 35%) — env setup and credential mount issues, all solvable at provider init time
- `workaround-found` (5/20 = 25%) — techniques that just work once discovered
- `tooling-bug` + `docs-gap` (4+4 = 40%) — actionable upstream and internal docs improvements

## 6 · Review Findings by Severity and Fix Status

| Finding | Severity | Description | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| M1 | **Major** | `start_workspace` silently ignores startup gate failures | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| M2 | **Major** | `WorkspaceProvider` protocol incompatibility; no adapter | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| M3 | **Major** | `await_completion` returns bare `bool`; no reason/phase | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| M4 | **Major** | Claude readiness checks 2 of 3 measured signals | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| m1 | Minor | Synthetic `~/.claude.json` fallback undocumented | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| m2 | Minor | No streaming abstraction; future arc unnamed | Applied @ 8e4d621 |
| — | PASS | Correctness (smoke 3/3), auth matrix, security, conventions | — |

**Blockers:** 0  
**Majors:** 4 → applied  
**Minors:** 2 → applied  
**PASS dimensions:** 4  
**All findings applied:** yes, commit 8e4d621 on agentprims-exp05

Reviewer ran the provider smoke independently (3/3 pass) before filing; no regression observed post-fixes.

## 7 · Fresh-Agent Validation Outcomes

| Agent | Smoke path | Python driver path | Token observed |
|---|---|---|---|
| claude | PASS | PASS | `● SMOKE-CLAUDE-2705074`, `● EXP06-PY-CLAUDE` |
| codex | PASS | PASS | `• SMOKE-CODEX-2705074`, `• EXP06-PY-CODEX` |
| gemini | PASS | PASS | `✦ SMOKE-GEMINI-2705074`, `✦ EXP06-PY-GEMINI` |

**Overall:** 6/6 round-trips PASS (3 agents × 2 paths)

**Doc gaps (4 found, 4 patched):**

| Gap | Severity | Issue | Cheapest patch |
|---|---|---|---|
| G1 | Low / blocking for step C | `from interactive_tmux import ...` fails; PYTHONPATH undocumented | One-line comment + path reference |
| G2 | Low / non-blocking | CLI shim paths are relative to provider dir, not stated | Prefix snippet with cwd comment |
| G3 | Low / non-blocking | Smoke prereqs in `smoke.sh` header, not in README | Copy prereq block to README |
| G4 | Cosmetic | Codex startup warning logged but not explained | One sentence in "Does NOT do today" section |

None of the gaps are architectural. All four patched in 6373b8e on agentprims-exp05.

## 8 · Budget Burn

All values are percentage-remaining start → end for the lab session (2026-06-10).

| Provider | Plan | Start % | End % | Burned pts |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude | weekly | 93 | 78 | **15** |
| codex | weekly | 63 | 57 | **6** |
| codex-spark | weekly | 61 | 36 | **25** |
| gemini | pro | 100 | 7 | **93** |
| gemini | flash | 100 | 96 | **4** |

**Highest burn:** gemini-pro at 93 percentage points.  
**Interpretation:** Gemini's pro-plan near-exhaustion is consistent with gmi_1 running two full experiments (EXP-03 and EXP-04+04b) plus the codex-side EXP-05a and review work drawing on codex-spark heavily. Claude weekly burn of 15 pts reflects cc_1's EXP-01 + EXP-05 ownership (two heaviest experiments by report size and iteration depth).

## 9 · Provider Deliverable Inventory

Location: `providers/workspaces/interactive-tmux/`

| File | Lines | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `Dockerfile` | 114 | Image build (node:22-slim + 3 CLIs + tmux) |
| `manifest.yaml` | 130 | Provider config, image tag, runtime mode |
| `README.md` | 274 | User-facing docs (build, smoke, Python API, per-agent matrix, auth) |
| `driver/__init__.py` | 9 | Package shim |
| `driver/interactive_tmux.py` | 1,064 | Full driver: 5 public methods, 3 adapter classes, CLI shim, WorkspaceProvider adapter |
| `scripts/entrypoint.sh` | 41 | Container entrypoint (no settings.json clobber — EXP-01 F-2 fix) |
| `scripts/smoke.sh` | 82 | 3-agent smoke test (marker+token grep) |
| `scripts/smoke_provider_adapter.py` | 201 | WorkspaceProvider protocol smoke (6 methods + 1 Claude prompt) |
| **Total** | **1,915** | |

**Run artifacts:** 10 files under `runs/` (smoke-run1/2 × 3 agents, post-review smoke × 3 agents, adapter smoke × 1)

**Backwards compatibility:** `providers/workspaces/claude-cli/` unchanged.  
`git diff origin/main..HEAD -- providers/workspaces/claude-cli/` = empty (verified in EXP-05 and cross-review).

**Build stats:** 544 MB image (vs. claude-cli's 688 MB); ~5 min build on VPS.  
**Idle RSS (all 3 agents active):** ~906 MB total (claude 300 + codex 173 + gemini 433).

## 10 · Notable Incidents

| Incident | Severity | Recovery |
|---|---|---|
| ntm first-send sat unsubmitted 3×; context built up silently | Low | Clear + resend; no work lost |
| Unrelated project fork-bombed VPS to 28,683 processes; SSH lockout | High | Reaped as root; full recovery; lab work unaffected |
| Gemini committed to local `main` (should have been feature branch) | Medium | Moved to branch; `git reset --hard` on main; never pushed |

One in-flight review was lost during the tmux-session wipe mid-lab; no committed work was lost.
